nodes.label: Knowledge Graph at graphify-out/
nodes.rationale: Provides query, path, and explain subcommands for scoped subgraph retrieval from graph.json. Prefer over raw grep or full GRAPH_REPORT.md for targeted questions. Update with `graphify update .` after code changes.

nodes.label: Booking and Scheduling Service (Coaches, Programs, Sessions)
/api/members Endpoint (Member CRUD via MEMBERSHIP direct URL)
/api/plans Endpoint (Plan CRUD via MEMBERSHIP direct URL)
JWT Bearer Token Authentication
nodes.rationale: All authenticated requests include Authorization: Bearer <token> header. Token obtained from POST /api/User/login, extracted from response body Data.Token field.

nodes.label: HTTP 500 on Unauthenticated Requests (Missing Auth Middleware Guard)
nodes.rationale: POST /api/plans without auth returns 500 instead of 401. Multiple endpoints exhibit this: plans, members, subscriptions. Suggests auth middleware throws unhandled exception when no Bearer token present instead of returning structured 401 ProblemDetails.

nodes.label: HTTP 502 Bad Gateway (YARP Cannot Reach Backend)
nodes.rationale: POST /api/members through gateway returns 502, indicating YARP reverse proxy cannot connect to membership service backend. May indicate service not running or route misconfiguration in gateway.yaml.

nodes.label: Test Interdependency Cascade (planId -> memberId -> subscriptionId)
nodes.rationale: Subscription tests depend on createdMemberId and createdPlanId from prior setup tests. When setup-create-member or setup-create-plan fails, create-subscription test fails with .toBeTruthy() assertion on undefined variables. Tests are sequentially dependent within test.describe block.

hyperedges.label: JWT Bearer-Authenticated API Endpoints Under Test
Membership E2E Test Failure Cascade (Auth->Service->Test Interdependency)
